Gilded Tiny Skull Earring  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: EAR
Charges: 5
AC: 5
HP: +20 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +6
Effect: Force (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 2.0)
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except DEF TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Gilded Tiny Skull Earring
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: EAR
Charges: 5
AC: 5
HP: +20 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +6
Effect: Force (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 2.0)
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except DEF TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Once tainted by Cazic, it is once again pure
Item Type:Jewelry
Light:Candle
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:32:58
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 5
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Frightlings (Removed)

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lesser Faydark
Item Lore: Once tainted by Cazic. It is once again pure.
Send a correction

I wish this was still active
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2004 at 5:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592262131354
32 posts
Looks like a good earring to get, too bad the quest is no longer active.
▲ Page top
Rating
QuoteReply
# May 27 2002 at 11:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362090311
15 posts
Im rating this item for priest casters. Since most priest casters have over 200 wisdom before they look for items like this. Ive also seen most preist casters (druids mostly) use forest loops. Forest loops give 3 wisdom and above 200 wisdom each wisdom point gives 6 mana. There, this item is defintly greater then a forest loop aside from the agi it gives for the ac and hp.
▲ Page top
Quest ended
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2002 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
This quest was active for about 2 weeks. I did it on the last day and it took me an hour. Nice item. I still wear it at lvl 60, until I find something much nicer ;)

Wingman
Last known place seen: Lesser Fay,
If you have seen this NPC or know his ware abouts.
Please contact Zanzer on the Ec'i sever. For he has been missing for some time. His mother is deeply worried that something bad may have happen to him. Also there seems to be an extra shadow knight that spawns in zone. This could be related. hmmmm.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 15 2001 at 5:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This quest is dead/deleted, correct? I asked in a bunch of different zones (on Prexus), and even asked some people that were wearing it, they said the quest to get this earring was only do-able back when LFay was corrupted. **** you Verant! I can never find a fun, and decently easy quest that reqards me with a nice item!
Zone

# Sep 19 2001 at 4:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249554436
1 post
are we able to still do this quest. Or have thing in the zone gone back to normal. thanks
▲ Page top
GREAT for Rogues
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 7:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757431951
70 posts
This item is Godly for any Soloing Rogue... As any of you know, all a Rogue needs to solo is a nice Stun effect, and aside from a Gnoll Hide Lariat, I've not seen another weapon that does this... What makes it even greater is the fact that it is a Triggered Effect, and although it is limited, it ain't that hard to get...
▲ Page top
What is wrong with you people?
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 12:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764891343
1 post
This earring is awesome, 5 AC, 20 hp, 20 mana, 6 sv disease?! Alot eassier to get than the friggin sarnak earring of station, not to mention, I'd rather have 20 hp, mana and save then 5 str, specially since I'm a hybrid. As for orc fangs... orc fangs suck. Cougar claw earrings are 20 times better than orc fangs and these earrings... well... just don't compare orc fangs with these. It's a pity the quest is over on Veeshan, or else I woulda gotten one of these.

Galanor Goldenblade
51 Cavalier
Veeshan
▲ Page top
RE: What is wrong with you people?
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2003 at 11:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757404277
Scholar
31 posts
Cougar Claw Earring now have Mana Preservation I effect which saves you 10% mana on spells below 20?

I am a 41 ranger and I still cast low level spells like Snare and Root so I liked by Cougar Claw Earrings. Of course now I have a Fine Antique Ring which has MP II which means if covers spells 44 and below (thus everything in my spellbook ATM).
▲ Page top
RE: What is wrong with you people?
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 1:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
Funny, I'd take an orc fang over cougar claw every day of the week and twice on sunday (and what's great is you can trade one cougar claw earring for like 6 orc fangs; thats 2 for you and 2 for each fo 2 twinks! =P)... 15hp is well worth 1ac/2dex. In the higher lvls of the game, HP > AC for a number of reasons...

At any rate, this is a very nice earring. Too bad ya can't get it anymore, would have liked one myself.
▲ Page top
RE: What is wrong with you people?
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 2:36 PM Rating: Default
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
Orc Fang: 3 AC 3 str 15 hps
Cougar Claw: 4 AC 3 str 2 dex

So 1 AC and 2 dex in favor of 15 hps is 20 times better? IMHO, they're both good earrings.

This item is very nice (even though the quest is over) but there's no need to rant how much another piece of equip sucks because it isn't as good as this... sheesh
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist

awesome
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 12:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757481025
2 posts
This appears to be one of the best warrior earrings in the game.

Great AC, HP's, and a random +Save thrown in. Why, oh why, can't my Ogre warrior wear this..

Good luck with the quest. Hope it is still active.
▲ Page top
Good but not that good
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 11:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751003709
View User Forum
120 posts
I would have to say the best non dragon/planar warrior earing is Sarnak Earing of station 5 ac 5 str but thats just my opinion, this is an ok earing, would be a whole lot better if it was unlimited. For pulling purposes;) force isnt that much dmg for ti to be foor for anything else, sept to kill a nuke. 90 dmg stun if i remember right, or maybe the 60 dmg one?
▲ Page top
RE: Good but not that good
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2002 at 1:55 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
In the higher lvls, str (and other core stats, sta aside) are rather pointless for tanks. HP is first priority, followed by AC, then resists/stats. You take care of your hp/ac and your stats will take care of themselves... str is way overrated for anything but monks/rogues. The 20hp/6svD will do you more good overall than would 5str. I have 121str unbuffed and I could care less... my HP/AC (and resists) are quite good, and thats what counts. With shammy buffs and abjunction of str, I can nearly cap my str anyway.
▲ Page top
RANDOM?????
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 10:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248837442
95 posts
excuse me, the save is really random???
#
if so, ill do this quest so long until i get one with magic save.

though itll hurt a bit to destroy all the others.
▲ Page top
this vs. orc fang
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2001 at 7:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248837442
95 posts
which one would u prefer?
▲ Page top
RE: this vs. orc fang
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 10:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
For my warrior, I have orc fangs, didn't really choose, becuase nobdy is selling these. The force clickable effect sounds awesome, assuming there is no level restriction to use. Especially if they can be recharged. Otherwise, I'd carry this in my backpack (to switch for an emergency), and wear the orc fangs. The +3 strenght is worth 5 less hp. Then again, once I can afford a hero bracer, and bracer of errolisi, I may not need the +3 strenght in the earrings as much. The save vs. disease would be nice when fighting undead. Of course, since this is Lore, we're talking one ear, not both. If I had an ear open, or had something crappy there, I'd take either.

__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts

Activity
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 2:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756767277
58 posts
This quest is active ONLY on servers that failed to defeat Cazic-Thule at the GM event that called Tunare's avatar. If the LFay zone on your server hasnt changed, then your server succeeded in driving Cazic-Thule off.
▲ Page top
RE: Activity
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 8:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1596385396259
Sage
64 posts
This is not true. Cazic-Thule was defeated on my server, but the Lesser Faydark is still quite changed. This may be the case on other servers, but it doesnt' necessarily apply to all servers.


Allisia Autumnrain of the Archangel
Druid of Tunare in the 24th Season
Tholuxe Paells
▲ Page top
Any Idea what this is for?
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 9:02 PM Rating: Default
Anhari
Scholar
362 posts
I did this quest last week, and found it worth dying for(got killed by a brownie scout on my way to the druid). I was 27th lvl at the time, and it only took about 30 mins to complete.

In looting the frightlings and other creatures i came accross this item:
Silver vile of Blacking (or blackend) Fluid.
MAGIC, LORE, NODROP

I can't remember what I looted it off of, and can find no references on ANY website as to what it is for.

Anyone have any ideas?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 14 2001 at 9:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Nope, not a hoax. I did it a few days back on the Nameless. Died twice to brownie outcasts (i'm lvl 35) but still worth it.
RE: not a hoax
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2001 at 4:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245545781
12 posts
This quest is only possible if your server lost the fight with Cazic Thule, and Lesser Fay is transformed into undead Fay. (Red Sky)
▲ Page top
RE: not a hoax
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361325064
21 posts
On the Xev server they had this change in Lesser Fay with the blood red sky, all the undead/corrupt things running around it. BUT, the zone has been changed back to the way it was previously. This happened about 2-3 weeks ago, so this item is no longer obtainable on the Xev server. Luckily, I got mine before the change went in again.

Attention Druids
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 6:32 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
To everyone interested in obtaining this earring, using wolf form made it easy for my 35 druid. As such, the only mobs (other than the tiny frightlings) that were aggro to me were the undead sprite horrors, which are pesky little sk's I believe. Anyhow, these can be avoided without much difficulty, and not having to deal with brownies makes this quest VERY easy to accomplish.

Force?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 3:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247010486
Scholar
360 posts
Not to sound like a total newbie, but can someone clarify what the triggered "Force" effect does?

Arynduil Greyleaf
24th Ranger of Tunare
Erollsi Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Force?
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 8:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757469021
Scholar
24 posts
Force is a level 34 cleric single-mob stun+dd:

http://eq.castersrealm.com/spells/spell.asp?Id=746

I'm fairly sure that all clerical nukes and stuns are magic-based.
▲ Page top
RE: Force?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 5:25 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754055236
Sage
140 posts
It's actually a stun/damage spell. Does about 100 points of damage and pushes the mob backwards a step or two. They're stunned for about 5-6 seconds.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 3:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If I remember right force is a AE spell that does around 100dmg and varies with lvl just like other spells. Think it's fire based.
RE: Force?
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 9:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247010486
Scholar
360 posts
